LanguageData.XiaoTi_AcceleratorTorch.label: Accelerator Torch
LanguageData.XiaoTi_AcceleratorTorch.description: Accelerates everything around it through spacetime distortion. All objects within range have their CompTick executed additional times at the configured multiplier. Multiple Accelerator Torches' effects stack (up to 16× total).\nIt self-repairs every second.
